title: FinalGen
text: Home * Knowledge * Endgame Tablebases * FinalGen FinalGen , a chess endgame tablebase generator for Windows written by Pedro Pérez Romero , able to solve chess positions with up to one piece per side, and almost any number of pawns, despite some complexity limitations regarding memory .
